text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh-heh. Excellent! Just a little more and I'm
done!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho is laughing boldly, sparking her
dorm leader, Fuji Kiseki, to come check on her.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh my. I certainly didn't expect to find you
making sweets when I heard all that racket.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Even I can bake a bit! I'm making chocolates
for Valentine's Day!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna feed them to my familiar and make
them do whatever I say!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ah, you've got a special Valentine's magazine...
"Chocolate recipes to steal their heart," huh?
Hehe, sounds promising!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my super deluxe baked chocolates are almost
done!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Eugh! Gross! Why do they smell like that?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... Just curious, but what did you put in
them?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I only used normal ingredients, just like the
magazine said! Chocolate, powdered sugar...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Plus some mugwort and chameleon plant to
enhance the effects. Oh, and I also added some
boiled-down mulberry and multiflora rose!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I see. It sounds like quite a high concentration of
magical power! Do you think your familiar can
handle it?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Oh! Good point... You'd think my familiar would have a lot of magic power, but that is not the case!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Maybe you should make another batch. I'd be
happy to help, if you'd like!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Okay, the ingredients and measurements seem
okay! So far, everything is just like the recipe
says.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Now it says we have to bake it thoroughly in the
oven! What do they think I am, some kinda
normie?! I can have it ready in no time at all with
a little magic!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Burn it all! Scarlet ☆ sage... Turn up the heat!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oopsie... Looks like you're using a lot of magical
power! I'm just going to adjust it a smidge so you
don't run out!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Now all we have to do is wrap it! I'll use some
magic string to tie it up so the magical power
doesn't escape!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh? But according to this grimoire, you should
wrap it up with a cute bow to drive the recipient
crazy.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're right! There sure is a lot of depth to
this charm magic!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm working in my office one day when a very
cheerful Sweep Tosho drops by.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Happy Valentine's Day, Familiar! Here, these
deluxe baked chocolates are for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's right... Today is Valentine's Day. I've been
so busy that I completely forgot.
choice_data_list: Thank you. I really appreciate it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I open the box, and the smell of baked chocolate
fills the room. It looks great!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
They're super special chocolates I made just for
you! If you eat one—

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
(I'm sure you'll already be captivated by the time
you notice anything! And then...)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
(You'll do whatever I say and become even more
familiar-y!)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! One bite and I'm sure you'll be hooked! Fuji
helped me make the magic a bit more mild, so it
should be perfect for you!
choice_data_list: So they're from both of you?
So they're from both of you?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: That's right. We made them tog—huh?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
(Wait a second! If there's magic from both of us in
there, that means...)

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You know, Familiar. I think I have quite a bit of
work you could do for me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. And it's not as if you can refuse. You're
crazy about me, after all!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: No way I'm letting that happen!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: You're my familiar! Give those chocolates back right this instant!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She grabs the box back so fast I don't even see
her move!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Don't you question me! No means no!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sweep Tosho runs off with the chocolates.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: No way I'm letting that happen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I put one in my mouth. It's crisp on the outside
and soft on the inside. Any bakery would be
proud to sell chocolate this good!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Aaagh! Why did you do that?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Idiot! You stupid idiot! Now the magic is going to
take effect!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Just to make sure... You wouldn't do anything for
Fuji if she asked you to, right?!
choice_data_list:
I'd like to think I'd help her if she was in
trouble.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Ugh! What are you saying?! You're my familiar!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It looks like I need to do a reversal ritual! Go lie
down on the sofa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It might be best not to resist... I do as she says
and lie down.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Epimedium, epimedium! Return this soul to its
master! Pronto!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...There! How do you feel? Do you remember who
your true master is?! Me or Fuji?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Phew... You're such a handful! I'm not gonna help
you next time you decide to just eat whatever
you find off the street! Got it?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She isn't particularly good at expressing herself,
but it seems like she cares about me. This
Valentine's Day has made that abundantly clear!
